name: Geotab Fleet Management API
what_it_does: Geotab MyGeotab API for fleet management and telematics platform. Enables AI agents to query vehicle locations, retrieve trip and driving data, access fuel consumption metrics, manage driver behavior events, and integrate fleet intelligence into operations workflows. Geotab is one of the world's largest fleet management providers.
use_cases: Querying real-time vehicle location and route data from fleet operations agents
Retrieving driver behavior events (speeding, braking) from safety analytics agents
Accessing fuel consumption and maintenance data from fleet cost optimization agents
Integrating Geotab telematics data into logistics and delivery workflow agents
best_when: A fleet operator using Geotab wants AI agents to monitor vehicle performance, analyze driver behavior, optimize routes, and integrate telematics data into operations and safety programs. AUTHORIZED USE ONLY.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Real-time vehicle location data reveals driver movements — sensitive personal data. AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Only fleet managers with legitimate business need should access driver location data.

auth.notes: Geotab uses JSON-RPC API (not REST). Authentication via username/password or session ID. API sessions are shared across fleet groups.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per device per month pricing; MyGeotab subscription
pricing.notes: Device-based pricing for Geotab GO devices. API access included with MyGeotab subscription.

performance.rate_limits: Geotab API: no hard rate limits but throttling on large queries

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY + AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Driver location data is sensitive — requires legitimate fleet management authority
Geotab uses JSON-RPC protocol (not REST) — different from standard REST patterns
No public MCP server — SDK or JSON-RPC integration required
Database name (fleet identifier) required for all API calls
Historical GPS data can be very large — use date ranges and result limits
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY + AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Real-time driver location and behavior data. SOC2, GDPR. EU/CA/AU data residency. Driver monitoring requires clear employee consent and disclosure.

security_score_components.security_notes: PRIVACY + AUTHORIZED USE ONLY. Driver location and behavior data. GDPR. Employee consent required for monitoring. EU data residency.
